available_models.name: OmniVoice (Default)
available_models.description: Massively multilingual zero-shot TTS model supporting over 600 languages.

available_models.name: OmniVoice Singing
available_models.description: OmniVoice singing model with support for style/expressive tags (similar to ElevenLabs). Use emotion, pitch, and style tags to customize the singing voice.
